name: Jonathan Curley
overview: Jonathan Curley is a UK-based aspiring technical arts professor, founder of multiple companies and non-profits, and an openly furry creator expressing himself through his art. Operating from Westhoughton, Bolton, he develops his studio, characters, political movements, and educational platforms under a cohesive identity system. His public persona, Velivian Fesothe, anchors his creative and technical work across entertainment, 3D art, and digital worldbuilding.

identity.ecosystem: Multi-domain creative universe spanning entertainment, politics, education, 3D, and technical arts

Furtainment.description: A furry-owned entertainment umbrella originally incorporated in 2017 and now being rebuilt as a global media ecosystem.

FurShows.description: A cultural video archive and global platform for furry and anthro shows.

Glow_Raiser.description: A creator-support initiative reinvesting ad revenue.

FurPortal_News.description: A PEGI-3-friendly news platform for anthropomorphic entertainment.

Labefy_Games.description: A game studio focused on anthropomorphic games and mods.

The_Furry_Party.description: A political organisation founded and chaired by Jonathan.
The_Furry_Party.intent: Jonathan intends to run as a UK parliamentary candidate under this banner.

focus: Technology education for children and adults
